narrative:
Wauseon One (precinct in Fulton County) has 908 registered voters, with 52.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.8 percentage points.
